affiliations.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司“C”小队

backstory.original: Weighing in at just under 30 pounds and with a grandmotherly demeanor befitting her advanced age, Rosie Beestinger is easily mistaken for someone on the wrong side of the 'aggressor/victim' relationship. But this is a mix-up that few people make more than once.
backstory.display: 罗茜·蜂刺体重不到 30 磅，有着与她高龄相称的祖母般的行为举止。在侵略者和受害者的身份中，总有人认为她是后者。但这种错误，很少有人会犯第二次。

description.original: Rosie Shadow Steps behind one of the three closest enemies at random and hits them with a flurry of blows.
description.display: 罗茜从三个最接近的敌人中选择一名，使用暗影步走到该敌人身后对其进行连击。

description.original: Rosie roots all enemies and darts around, striking up to 10, then prepares to deflect more missiles.
description.display: 罗茜定身所有敌人并四处突进，攻击最多 10 名敌人，然后准备偏转更多飞弹。

longDescription.original: Rosie roots all enemies in place for 5 seconds and becomes a blur of movement, pummeling up to 10 enemies on screen for ultimate damage, and refilling her deflect stacks to max.
longDescription.display: 罗茜将所有敌人定身 5 秒，变成一道虚影对屏幕上最多 10 名敌人造成杀招伤害，并将“偏转”的堆叠层数增加到最大值。

description.desc: Rosie deals +$amount% increased damage for every Champion in the formation younger than she is, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位比罗茜年轻的勇士，均使她造成的伤害提高 +$amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Rosie's damage is increased by having Champions in the formation who are younger than she is. Stack that formation!
tipText.display: 阵型中比罗茜年轻的勇士会使她的伤害提高。好好构建阵型！

description.desc: Rosie gains a deflect stack every time she attacks. She can store up to $max_stacks deflect stacks at once. Whenever an enemy attacks the formation with a ranged/magic attack, Rosie consumes a deflect stack and reflects it back at the attacker. The reflected attack deals Rosie's damage with a 100% additively increased chance of dealing a critical hit. This effect can trigger as often as necessary, as long as Rosie has deflect stacks available.
罗茜每次攻击可获得一层偏折堆叠层数。她一次可以储存最多 $max_stacks  层偏折堆叠层数。每当敌人使用远程或法术攻击来攻击阵型时，罗茜会消耗一层偏折堆叠层数，将攻击反弹给攻击者。反弹攻击造成的伤害等于罗茜的伤害值，并且将暴击率提高 100%，以加算方式堆叠。只要罗茜拥有偏折堆叠层数，此效果可无限次触发。

tipText.original: Rosie can deflect ranged/magic attacks back at the attacker, increasing her own damage each time she does so!
tipText.display: 罗茜能够将远程或法术攻击反弹给攻击者，每次反弹都能提高她自身的伤害！

description.desc: Rosie gains a Timeless Body stack every time she successfully deflects a ranged/magic attack with Deflect Missiles. For each Timeless Body stack she has, Rosie increases the effect of Sassy by $amount%, stacking additively. Stacks persist between adventures.
每当罗茜成功使用拨挡飞弹反弹一次远程或法术攻击，她会获得一层青春永驻堆叠层数。每有一层青春永驻堆叠层数，罗茜的潮流先锋效果就会提高 $amount%，以加算方式堆叠。这些堆叠层数在冒险之间保持不变。
Unlocks Rosie's Grammamancy Ultimate Attack
解锁罗茜的祖母巫术杀招攻击
Whenever Rosie is your BUD-setting Champion, the rate of BUD decay is decreased by $amount%.
当罗茜是你的基础杀招伤害设置勇士时，基础杀招伤害衰减降低 $amount%。
Increases the effect of Sassy by $amount% for every Female or Nonbinary Champion in the formation who is younger than Rosie, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位比罗茜年轻的女性或非二元性别勇士，潮流先锋的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Rosie particularly enjoys grandmothering females younger than herself.
specializationDescription.display: 罗茜特别喜欢关照比自己年轻的女性。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Sassy by $amount% for every Champion in the formation that belongs to the "C"-team, Acquisitions Incorporated, or Wafflecrew affiliations, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位隶属于 C 小队、艾奎兹玄有限责任公司或华夫饼小队从属组织的勇士，潮流先锋的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Rosie has close ties to the assorted Acquisitions Incorporated teams.
specializationDescription.display: 罗茜与各个艾奎兹玄有限责任公司团队关系密切。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Sassy by $amount% for every Champion in the formation that is a Halfling, Rogue, or Monk, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位半身人、游荡者或武僧勇士，潮流先锋的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: The legend of Grandmother Night is well known in the halfling community.
specializationDescription.display: 老奶奶之夜的传说在半身人社区广为人知。

conditions.desc: Rosie's critical hit damage is increased by $amount% for every $per_num_levels levels she has been leveled up, stacking multiplicatively. Additionally, for every 3rd attack, Rosie makes a Shadow Arts attack that deals 10 seconds worth of BUD damage to all enemies in a small area.

Rosie's critical hit damage is increased by $amount% for every $per_num_levels levels she has been leveled up, stacking multiplicatively. Additionally, for every 4th attack, Rosie makes a Shadow Arts attack that deals 10 seconds worth of BUD damage to all enemies in a small area.
罗茜每提高 $per_num_levels  个等级，暴击伤害就会提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。另外，每次发动第三次攻击时，罗茜会进行一次暗影艺术攻击，对小范围内对所有敌人造成 10 秒的基础杀招伤害。
罗茜每提高 $per_num_levels  个等级，暴击伤害就会提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。另外，每次发动第四次攻击时，罗茜会进行一次暗影艺术攻击，对小范围内对所有敌人造成 10 秒的基础杀招伤害。
The damage bonus provided by Timeless Body stacks is increased by $amount%, and whenever she deflects a ranged/magic attack with Deflect Missiles she gains 7 stacks of Timeless Body instead of 1.
The damage bonus provided by Timeless Body stacks is increased by $amount%, and whenever she deflects a ranged/magic attack with Deflect Missiles she gains 4 stacks of Timeless Body instead of 1.
由青春永驻堆叠层数提供的伤害加成提高 $amount%，并且每当罗茜使用拨挡飞弹成功偏折一次远程或法术攻击时，她会获得 7 层青春永驻堆叠层数，而非 1 层。
由青春永驻堆叠层数提供的伤害加成提高 $amount%，并且每当罗茜使用拨挡飞弹成功偏折一次远程或法术攻击时，她会获得 4 层青春永驻堆叠层数，而非 1 层。

description.desc: Rosie's attack speed cooldown is lowered by $amount seconds (stacking additively) and her damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% (stacking multiplicatively) for each member of the "C"-Team in the formation, including herself.
罗茜的攻击速度冷却时间降低 $amount  秒（以加算方式堆叠），并且阵型中每有一位 C 小队成员（包括她自己），她的伤害就会提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%（以乘算方式堆叠）。

specializationDescription.display: 罗茜总是帮助自己的家人。

description.desc: Increases Rosie's critical hit damage by $amount% and the effect of Slow Decay is set to $(new_amount___2)%.
使罗茜的暴击伤害提高 $amount%，并将缓慢衰减的效果设为 $(new_amount___2)%.

description.original: Oh, I've been known to brawl in my past.
description.display: 噢，过去我一直因为打架而出名。

description.original: I'm a slippery little grandma.
description.display: 我是个狡猾的小老太太。

description.original: What? Who said that? Sometimes I am!
description.display: 什么？谁说的？有时候我确实是！

description.original: Sass must be expertly allocated for maximum effect.
description.display: 为了获得最大效果，必须巧妙分配活力。

description.original: This mind isn't a day over 21! Keen as heck!
description.display: 我的心还没有超过 21 岁！它敏锐无比！

description.original: What? Who said that? Sometimes I am!
description.display: 什么？谁在说话？有时候是我！

description.original: This arrow you shot at me would look REALLY good through your face.
description.display: 你射向我的这支箭，穿过你的脸一定会更好看。

description.original: Never ask a grandma her age! Especially if your name is Perkins!
description.display: 绝对别问奶奶她的年龄！特别是叫珀金斯的人！

description.original: Do you know what I have to DO to look this good at my age?
description.display: 你知道我要付出多大努力才能在这个年纪保持风采吗？

description.original: The Way of the Shadow knows!
description.display: 暗影之道自有分晓！

description.original: Oh, you WISH you were one of my kids!
description.display: 噢，你恨不能做我的孩子！

description.original: Don't embrace me in front of my work associates!
description.display: 别在我同事面前抱我！

description.original: Oh, you think you can handle the big kid weights? All right, try to keep up!
description.display: 噢，你觉得自己能搞定大人的重量？行啊，努力跟上吧！

effects.description: Increases the bonus Timeless Body stacks provided by Grandma-Bod by $amount%

description.original: I can take way more hits than you - here, watch!
description.display: 我能承受的打击比你多得多，来，看好！

description.original: Hey, think I could punch that tree in half? Let's find out!
description.display: 嘿，你觉得我能把那棵树一拳打成两半吗？试试看吧！

description.original: Yes. Kicking the door down IS an option.
description.display: 没错，把门踹开也是一个选择。

description.original: I may have seen some things...
description.display: 我可能看到了什么东西……

description.original: That Orc had more teeth before, right? RIGHT?
description.display: 那兽人以前牙齿更多，对吧？对吧？

description.original: Don't mess with a grandma!
description.display: 别惹老太太！

character_sheet_details.backstory: Weighing in at just under 30 pounds and with a grandmotherly demeanor befitting her advanced age, Rosie Beestinger is easily mistaken for someone on the wrong side of the 'aggressor/victim' relationship. But this is a mix-up that few people make more than once.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Rosie is a sassy DPS grandma whose damage is buffed by Champions who are younger than her. She also deflects missiles with her mind.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 罗茜·蜂刺体重不到 30 磅，有着与她高龄相称的祖母般的行为举止。在侵略者和受害者的身份中，总有人认为她是后者。但这种错误，很少有人会犯第二次。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 罗茜是个活泼的伤害输出型祖母，她的伤害会通过比她年轻的勇士得到增益。她也能用思维偏转飞弹。

original.name: Shadow Step
original.description: Rosie Shadow Steps behind one of the three closest enemies at random and hits them with a flurry of blows.

display.name: 暗影步
display.description: 罗茜从三个最接近的敌人中选择一名，使用暗影步走到该敌人身后对其进行连击。

original.name: Grammamancy
original.description: Rosie roots all enemies and darts around, striking up to 10, then prepares to deflect more missiles.
original.long_description: Rosie roots all enemies in place for 5 seconds and becomes a blur of movement, pummeling up to 10 enemies on screen for ultimate damage, and refilling her deflect stacks to max.

display.name: 祖母巫术
display.description: 罗茜定身所有敌人并四处突进，攻击最多 10 名敌人，然后准备偏转更多飞弹。
display.long_description: 罗茜将所有敌人定身 5 秒，变成一道虚影对屏幕上最多 10 名敌人造成杀招伤害，并将“偏转”的堆叠层数增加到最大值。

original.name: Sassy
original.tip_text: Rosie's damage is increased by having Champions in the formation who are younger than she is. Stack that formation!

display.name: 潮流先锋
display.tip_text: 阵型中比罗茜年轻的勇士会使她的伤害提高。好好构建阵型！

original.name: Deflect Missiles
original.tip_text: Rosie can deflect ranged/magic attacks back at the attacker, increasing her own damage each time she does so!

display.name: 拨挡飞弹
display.tip_text: 罗茜能够将远程或法术攻击反弹给攻击者，每次反弹都能提高她自身的伤害！

original.name: Matriarch
original.specialization_description: Rosie particularly enjoys grandmothering females younger than herself.

display.name: 大家长
display.specialization_description: 罗茜特别喜欢关照比自己年轻的女性。
